titleStmt.title: SII 38.103: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 103. (A.R. No. 103 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and incomplete. It seems that two officials Vaḷavaṉ Mūvēndavēḷāṉ and Vikramaśiṅga Mūvēndavēḷāṉ conducted an enquiry into the past endowments made to the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr by convening a meeting at the maṇḍapa called Maṇṇaikoṇḍachōḻaṉ in the same temple. The inscription recounts the past endowments. Śōḻan Kumaraṉ alias Madhurāntaka Mārāyaṉ, a native of Sāttamaṅgalam in Aṇḍāṭṭukūṟṟam (a sub-division) of Rājēndrasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, made a gift of seven and odd vēli of fallow land after purchase with gold, in the dēvadāna villages, for performing oil bath to god, Ādhipurināthadēvar, for providing food offerings and also for conducting procession.

It appears the inscription also records another grant. Chandrakramavittaṉ, a resident of Maṇali alias Siṅgavishṇu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puḻal-naḍu in Puḻalkoṭṭam, made a similar gift of land for the same purpose. The details relating to various items required for such food offerings are enumerated and the allotment of paddy for procuring such items are also given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
badly damaged
⎯⎯ Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu Irupattāṟāvatu nāḷ to ⎯⎯
⎯⎯ Atikārikaḷ vaḷavaṉmuveṉtaveḷārum vikkiramaciṅkamuventaveḷārum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkkoṭṭa
ttu puḻalnāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūr koyiliṉ muṉpil maṇṇaikoṇṭacoḻanil koyil
ttuppon=ta yukam coḻamaṇṭalattu rājendraciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭukkūṟṟattu
cattimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ coḻaṉ kumaranāṉa maturāntakamārāyaṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār koyilil tiru
viḻā Eḻuntaruḷum Ātipuranātatevarkku caṉitoṟum tiruveṇṇaikkāppuc cāttiyaruḷavum tiruvamutu ceytaruḷavum ti
ruvamutu ceytaruḷumiṭattu caṭṭic coṟu kuṭukkavum pavaṉi Eḻun=taruḷuvum kkum I
titta tevaṉ maturān=takamārāyaṉ Uḻakku [ ṅkuṭikaḷukku] veṇṭum nivan=tattukkum Ivan varakkaṭṭiṉa pon koṇṭu
Ittevar tevatāṉavūrikaḷil muṉpu payireṟātu pāḻkiṭanta nilattile Iṉnivantaṅkaḷukku veṇṭukiṉṟa
tirutti vaittaṉilaṅkaḷukku kalluveṭṭu vittukkuṭukka veṉṟu Atikārikaḷ vaḷavaṉ muven=taveḷārum vikkirama
ciṅkamuventa veḷāru(m)māka Ittevar tevatāṉap puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭu maṇaliyāṉa ciṅkaviṣṇucaturvvedi maṅkalattu
brahmāṇaṉ Ivvūr can=tirakkiramavittaṉum yānak kiramavittaṉum Ivvūr madhyastaṉ Ati
Ivvūr muṉpu payireṟātu pāḻkiṭan=ta nilameṉṟu nilam Ivvūr vaṭakaḻaṉi kiḻpāṟkellai ciṟu meṭṭeri mel
ḷakkum viḷākattukku nirpāyum vāykkālukkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tāṉṟipaṭṭi kkum maṇali mutta
Ēri kuṟucci vaṭakku melpāṟkellai putteri talaiy vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
koyil Ellaikkum vai llaikkum teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ kellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilamum tirucoḻaṉ kuḻi
veli Eḻeyaraikkāl Itu veli Oṉṟinukku tevatāṉamāka kālāl nellu Irupa
taṇaka māka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nellu nūṟṟit toṇṇūṟṟoṉpatiṉ kalaṉe tūṇippatakkum I vaṭaka
ni ṉilattukku teṉpāṟkellai piḷḷaiyār cuppiramaṇṇiya tevar nilattukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai kaṇapati vāykkālu
kku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrmañcittukku teṟkum melpāṟkellai mā kattuṭakku Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷḷaka
ppaṭṭaṉilam patināṟcāṇkolāl kuḻi patiṉāyiratteḻu nūṟṟem ṭa nālveli Aiñce Itu veli
ṉukku Arumoḻitevaṉ marakkālāl nellu pattoṉpatiṉ kalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nellu kalaṉe kuṟuṇiyiruṉāḻiyu
Āka veli paṉṉiraṇṭaraiyināl nellu muṉṟe Eḻu kuṟuṇi Iṉ nellu kalaṉe kuṟuṇiyiruṉāḻiyu
Eḻun=taruḷum Ātipurinātane piriti caṉitoṟum Eṇṇaikkāppuccāttiyaruḷa caṉi Oṉṟukku
veṇṇai vaṟu nāḻi Uḻakkaḻakkāṉukku poṉ nūṟu mañcāṭiyum muṉṟumāvum tiruviḻā cani Oṉṟukku
mañcaḷ kāppu Oru ma �ka mañcaḷaimpattoru palattukku poṉ mañcāṭiyum caṉi Aimpattoṉṟu Āka
meṟpaṭikku cāttun=tiruppari caṭṭamiraṇṭinukku poṉ kaḻañcum tiruvuṇṇā
ttum neṭuvaṭam patināṟāka meṟpaṭikku vaṭam Eṇṇūṟṟorupattāṟukku niraṇṭu mañcā O
ru ceviṭāka meṟpaṭikku Aṟunāḻiyuḻakke Oru ceviṭukku poṉ Araikkaḻañcu Onṟukku citārikkiṉukku citāri Aimpattoṉ
kālukku poṉeḻu mañcāṭiyum cani Oṉṟukku tiruvamutu paḻavaraci patteṭṭu kuttal patakkāka meṟpaṭikku paḻavarici Eṇ kalane tūṇi
ppatakkukku Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu Irupati kalane mukkuṟuṇiyu cani Oṉṟukku neyyamutu mukkuṟuṇi neyyā
ṇiyumāka neyyamutuḻakke Iruceviṭaraiyum meṟpaṭi neyyamutu Oṉpati nāḻi Uriyāka Iru ceviṭṭaraikku poṉ kālum cani O
ṉṟukku caṟkaraiyamutu nāḻikkum puḷiṅkaṟikkuriyumāka caṟkkaraiyāḻākkāka meṟpaṭikku caṟkarai muppattoru nāḻi Uḻakke yāḻākkunukku poṉ
mukkāle mañcāṭiyum cani Oṉṟukku paruppamutu muḻakkāka meṟpaṭikku paruppu tūṇiyaṟu nāḻi Uḻakkukku nellu kalamum cani Oṉṟukku kaṟiyamu
tupattukku nellu nāṉāḻiyāka meṟpaṭikku nellu Irukalaṉe kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum cani Oṉṟukku tayiramutu nāḻiyāka meṟpaṭikku nūṟṟiru nā
nāpattoru nāḻikku nellu tūṇippatakku muṉnāḻiyum cani Oṉṟukku puḷiṅkaṟiyamutukku ki Iru nāḻi Āka meṟpaṭikku kiḻiṭṭaṉa Iru nāḻi Āka meṟpaṭikku kiḻiṭṭaṉa nūṟṟiru nā
ḻikku nellukkalane Aṟunāḻiyum cani Oṉṟukku miḷaku Āḻākkāka meṟpaṭikku miḷaku Aṟunāḻi Uḻakkāḻākkinukku poṉ nālu mañcāṭiyumiraṇ
ṭu munṟu māvum cani Oṉṟukku kaṭukum cīrakam meṟpaṭikku kaṭuku paṉṉiru nāḻi muḻakkukku poṉ Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyum vum cani Oṉṟukkuppu mukkā
l meṟpaṭikkuppu kuṟuṇiṉāṉāḻi muḻakkukku nellu tūṇiaṟu nāḻi Uḻakkum cani Oṉṟukku vāḻaippaḻam pattāka meṟpaṭikku
paḻam Āka nūṟṟorupatukku poṉ kālum caṉi Oṉṟukku veṟuṅ kāyamutu veṟuṅkāyirupatāka meṟpaṭikku veṟuṅkāyi Āyirattirupatukku
poṉ Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyu Iraṇṭu māvum cani Oṉṟukku veṟṟilai Eṇpatāka meṟpaṭikku tariyilaikkaṭṭu vampattoṉṟukku nellu
ṟu nāḻi muḻakkiṉukku meṟpaṭi[ kku] miru kaḻañcaraiye mañcāṭikku poṉ kaḻañcum Eḻun=taruḷi Irun=ta Iṭattu Eri
viḷakkuṉukku Eṇṇai Uriyum pavaṇi Eḻun=taruḷumiṭatteriyum viḷakkukaḷukku Eṇṇai Iru nāḻiyumāka cani Oṉṟukku Eṇṇai Iru nāḻi Uriyāka
meṟpaṭikkeṇṇai nūṟṟirupatteḻu nāḻi Urikku poṉ mukkaḻañce nālu mañcāṭiyum prasātaṅ kuṭukkum caṭṭic coṟu pattinukku cani Oṉṟukkum
patteṭṭukkuttalarici kuṟuṇi Eḻunāḻiyāka meṟpaṭikku Arici Eḻu kalane Iru tūṇi mukkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻikku Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇattāl nellu pat
toṉpatiṉ kalane Irutūṇi mukkuṟuṇiyum cani Oṉṟukku kaṟi nālukku nellunānāḻiyum Uppuḻakkukku nellu muḻakkum tayir nānāḻikku nelliru nāḻiyum
[eṇpatakku] nelliru nāḻiyumāka meṟpaṭikku nellu nāṟkalaṉe Irutūṇippatakke munāḻikkum cani Oṉṟukku neyyuḻakkuñ caṟkaraiyuḻakkum
Iruceviṭu Araiyum vāḻaippaḻam pattu veṟuṅkāyirupatum Āka meṟpaṭikku ney paṉṉiru nāḻi muḻakkukkum miḷaku
Iru ceviṭaraikkum vāḻaippaḻam Aiññūṟṟerupatukkum veṟuṅkāyāyirattirupatukkumāka poṉ kaḻañce Iraṇṭu mañcāṭiyu mañcu māvum
vaṉukku cani Oṉṟukku nellukkuṟuṇiyum viṟakiṭuvāṉukku nellu kuṟuṇiyum Amutiṭuvāṉukku nellu Eḻunāḻiyum Uṭaiyāṇa O l ne
llu kuṟuṇiyum Āka meṟpaṭikku nellu patiṉaṟu kalane Aiñkuṟuṇi Aiññāḻiyum Aṉaiccu kā tiruvolakattirantu pavaṇi Eḻuntaruḷi
m Ikkoyil taṉiyilārkaḷ nellu patiṉkalamum tirunan=tavaṉa maturān=taka mārāyaṉukku kuṭikaḷ mūvarkku nāḷ Oṉṟukku
puṭavai mutalpon kaḻañcu Iraṇṭu
nellu patiṉkalane
Digital edition of SII 38.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
